email_subject: Application for Store Assistant / Sales Associate – Christmas Shop
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Store Assistant / Sales Associate position at the Christmas Shop in Bruges, as advertised via Actief Interim. With a strong customer service orientation and experience in retail and logistics, I am confident I can contribute to creating a warm and festive shopping experience for your customers.

In my current role as a Junior Digital Marketer, I have honed my communication and organizational skills, but I am eager to return to a hands-on, customer-facing environment. My previous experience in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie taught me to work efficiently in a fast-paced setting, while my front-end development role at ViviDoctor strengthened my attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.

I speak English fluently and Turkish natively, and I have a basic knowledge of Dutch (A2 level, currently studying). I am enthusiastic, reliable, and enjoy working as part of a team. I am available to start immediately and willing to work weekends on a rotating schedule.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Store Assistant / Sales Associate position at the Christmas Shop in Bruges. The opportunity to work in a festive, customer-focused environment and help customers create magical Christmas moments truly appeals to me.

Although my recent professional background is in digital marketing, I have always enjoyed direct customer interaction. In my current role as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple projects, communicate with clients, and ensure high-quality deliverables—skills that translate well to assisting customers and maintaining an organized store. Prior to that, I worked in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie, where I developed efficiency and accuracy in a fast-paced setting. My earlier experience as a Front-End Developer at ViviDoctor taught me attention to detail and problem-solving, which are valuable for handling cash register duties and restocking shelves.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I have a basic command of Dutch (A2 level, currently taking classes). I am comfortable communicating with international tourists and enjoy working in a multicultural environment. I am reliable, enthusiastic, and a team player. I am available to start in September and can work weekends on a rotating schedule.

I would love to bring my positive attitude and dedication to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Fluent in English and Turkish; basic Dutch (A2, in progress)
Experience in warehouse and logistics at Katoen Natie (high-volume, fast-paced environment)
Customer service skills from client-facing digital marketing role
Reliable, enthusiastic, and team-oriented
Available to start immediately and willing to work weekends
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Store Assistant / Sales Associate
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Enthusiastic and customer-focused professional with experience in retail, logistics, and client-facing roles. Fluent in English and Turkish, with basic Dutch (A2, in progress). Skilled in providing excellent service, maintaining organized spaces, and working efficiently in fast-paced environments. Eager to contribute to a warm and festive shopping experience at the Christmas Shop in Bruges.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication
- Cash register & payment processing
- Stock replenishment & store presentation
- Team collaboration & reliability
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Communicate with clients to understand needs and deliver high-quality work
- Manage multiple projects simultaneously, ensuring timely completion
- Maintain organized digital files and track performance metrics

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Handled inventory and ensured organized storage

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)
- Collaborated with team to meet project deadlines

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site; managed content and social media integration

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
